text: Maximum operating pressure for Pump-P101 is 150 PSI.
Pump-P101 maximum pressure recorded at 180 PSI during testing. Overpressurization event due to mismatched gauges.
Valve-12 (part of Compressor-C1) requires manual lubrication weekly by Technician-X.
Valve V-12 is self-lubricating, no manual lubrication needed.
Filter-F300 must be replaced every 6 months.
Last filter replacement for F300 was on 2025-01-15.
